ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Oct-07-2008 Continued For Letter To Oct-28-08 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 612

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-22-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Robert Sellards, Esq. for and with Plaintiff: David Franco, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Sergio Guzman aka Sergio Guzman Santana as follows:
Damages $57,776.76
Prejudgment Interest $4,445.42
Attorney's Fees $2,440.00
Costs $415.00, for a total of $65,077.18
Judgment signed in open court.
